text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite returning to the turf training track,
Satono Diamond's running is still off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, her form has deteriorated significantly, as
have her lap times.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
...
Tell me honestly, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Do you think I'll be able to shape up before the
autumn Tenno Sho?
choice_data_list: I think we'll be cutting it close at this point.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't need to be perfect for the Kyoto
Daishoten, as it's only a warm-up race, but there
isn't much time left until the autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'm going to go back to how I was running before.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to run like this in my race with
McQueen!
choice_data_list:
Don't worry. We'll make in time for the autumn
Tenno Sho!

Don't worry. We'll make in time for the autumn
Tenno Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Reverting her running style must be an agonizing
decision. To honor her feelings, I must ensure
she's in her best condition before the autumn
Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Why?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I was much faster before, so this should work,
but...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, she isn't able to run like she used to.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Overfocusing on reverting to her previous running
style only serves to upset her balance, making her
flustered and more self-conscious.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I wonder how we can break her out of this vicious
cycle. If Satono Diamond has forgotten how she
used to run, then there's only one thing for me to
do.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hello! What did you want to talk to me about?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I think I know what you're talking about. I've
noticed that her form's been off recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I briefly explain about how Satono Diamond
hasn't had much luck trying to go back to her
previous way of running.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I see. In that case, why don't I do some running
with her?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I dunno how to fix her problem, but if we run
together, we might figure something out!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: You want me to run with you?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I wanna run 2,200 meters, the same
distance as the Takarazuka Kinen, and revisit the
training I did back then.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What do you think, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
All right. That distance is right between the
length of the autumn Tenno Sho and the Kyoto
Daishoten, so it'll be good training for me too.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Oh, you. I should be the one thanking you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Satono Diamond and Kitasan Black begin
their 2,200-meter run.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: HAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I have to increase my pace a little so I don't get
left behind...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah! Ugh!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I can't close our gap! Are my steps landing too
hard? It's no good! I'm falling farther behind!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (I can't run properly...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hm... You don't seem like your usual self.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's no need to push yourself. Let's call it
a day for now!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: No, I want to keep going...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
But it didn't feel like you were able to
concentrate on our run.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
You might get injured if you're distracted, so let's
end things here for now, okay?
choice_data_list: Yeah, that's it for today. Get some rest!
Yeah, that's it for today. Get some rest!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Okay... I understand. Thanks for the run.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond must be wary of getting injured
because she nods without further argument.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Hey, since it's still early, let's take a detour on the
way back!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but I―

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Come on!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Wait, I―

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm starving! Let's head to the shopping district
first!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Mmm! This is delicious!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Which flavors did you get, Dia?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Half chili cheese dog and half mint chocolate
chip.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
There you go again with another of your weird
flavor combinations...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The unexpected pairing seemed interesting to me!
The sweet and spicy mix packs quite a surprising
flavor profile. ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: You're braver than I am!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm thirsty, so let's go grab some drinks! We
should enjoy them somewhere with a nice view!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita! You're going to make me drop my taiyaki if
you yank on my hand like that out of nowhere!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Sorry! But you didn't drop it, did you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(Even since we were young, Kita has been leading
me by the hand like this...)

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text: Kita... How far do we still have to go?

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text: Just a little more. Look!

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text: Whoa! We're so high up!

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text: This is my special spot! I wanted to show you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (She's taken me to so many different places...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... It's pretty exhausting climbing up here without taking any breaks, huh?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Yes, it really is... Pant, huff...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
This place... You took me by the hand and
brought me here a long time ago, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It wasn't just here either. You took me to so many
places. You were the one who introduced me to
the outside world.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I've always thought of you as an older sister.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Haha! You know, I've always tried to act like your
older sister when I'm with you!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I want to walk before you so I can lead the way...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hey, Dia! Race you to the riverbank!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Why do you want to race me all of a
sudden?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It doesn't matter, let's just do it! Ready, set, GO!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hold o—no fair!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I win! All right! Next, let's race to the park!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: What?! Oh, come on!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Let's go! I'm gonna leave you behind!

text_block_list.name: Young Kitasan
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, Dia! Hurry up! I'm gonna leave you
behind!

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text: Wait, Kita! Slow down!

text_block_list.name: Young Dia
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Hehe! Just a little more!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Huff... I won't let you leave me behind!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Right! Last up, the dorm! That'll be our finish line!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I'm going to catch you this time!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I used to run with my eyes trained on her back
like this long ago...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (All I wanted to do was to catch up to Kita.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: All riiight!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (Huh? I'm... I'm running properly...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I'm running naturally without thinking about
anything!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I see... I've always just run while engrossed in my
chase after Kita...)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(And I would do it while imagining the look on her
face when I caught up and passed her.)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: (It's so fun... Running is fun!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Gooooal!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hey, Kita...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! That was fun!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I had fun too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I'll pass you next time for sure!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Hehe! As if I'd let you!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I simply have to run with my all heart, just like I
did back then...)
